title: Legislation introduced to hold arsonists accountable as California battles record-breaking wildfires and devastating losses.
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Seven of the ten largest fires in California history have occurred within the last five years.",
    "An estimated 20 percent of wildfires are the result of arson.",
    "The 2024 Park Fire burned over 400,000 acres and destroyed 709 homes in Butte and Tehama counties.",
    "Arson arrests have significantly increased over the past decade.",
    "AB 297 would add a sentencing enhancement of three to five years for arsonists whose actions result in the burning of 500 or more acres of forestland."
  ]
}
```
